name: House of Commons Library: General election 2024 results
notes: Commons Library publishes constituency-level and candidate-level 2024 result files based on verified official declarations.

name: House of Commons Library: General election results 1918 to 2019
notes: Long-run Westminster results by constituency; pre-1974 geography notes require explicit boundary handling.

name: Democracy Club election data and APIs
notes: Candidate and results CSV/API coverage is broad but updates quickly during election periods; statements of persons nominated remain the promotion gate.

name: Electoral Commission election information API
notes: Run by Democracy Club on behalf of the Electoral Commission; postcode-based and not a substitute for full area marts.

name: ONS small-area population estimates methodology
notes: Defines output-area best-fit and ward/constituency population estimate methods; essential for population feature confidence.

name: Boundaries Scotland data files
notes: Provides current and historic Scottish local government and Scottish Parliament GIS boundaries.

name: Welsh Government DataMapWales: Senedd constituency boundaries 2026
notes: Official 16-constituency boundary layer for the 2026 closed-list Senedd system.

name: Home Office immigration system statistics: regional and local authority data
notes: Use route-specific quarter-end stock only; do not merge with arrivals, small boats, or wider migration totals.
